title: config.fleet section + manifest.blackboard + path injection + `agent-bober blackboard` CLI
description: Add the additive config/manifest surface and the explicit child seam. (1) src/config/schema.ts: add an OPTIONAL `fleet` section to BoberConfigSchema = { blackboardDbPath: z.string(); blackboardNamespace: z.string(); blackboardSubject: z.string(); maxRounds: z.number().int().min(1).max(3) } wrapped .optional() — needed because BoberConfigSchema strips unknown keys (schema.ts:405), so this is the child-visible channel. (2) src/fleet/manifest.ts: add optional blackboard { namespace: z.string().min(1); maxRounds: z.number().int().min(1).max(3).default(3) } to FleetManifestSchema. (3) src/fleet/index.ts (or a small helper): resolveBlackboardPath(manifest) returns join(resolve(rootDir),'.bober','memory',namespace,'facts.db') when manifest.blackboard is set, else undefined. (4) src/fleet/scaffolder.ts: when a blackboard is configured for the run, write the fleet section into each child's bober.config.json with blackboardDbPath=<the absolute shared path>, blackboardNamespace=namespace, blackboardSubject=child.folder, maxRounds; when not configured, write NO fleet section (byte-identical). (5) New `agent-bober blackboard` CLI command (registerBlackboardCommand, mirroring registerFleetCommand at cli/index.ts:321) with subcommands: `publish <value>` (loads cwd bober.config.json, opens SharedBlackboard at config.fleet.blackboardDbPath, publishes a finding with subject=config.fleet.blackboardSubject, round defaults to 1 or --round N) and `read [--all]` (prints siblings' findings, or all with --all). Both error clearly (printed message, exit 1, never throw) when no fleet section is present. The CLI reads the absolute path from config ONLY — never re-derives from cwd.

successCriteria.description: Build + typecheck pass with zero errors.
Full suite passes; only the 6 known cockpit-integration MCP failures may fail; existing config/manifest/scaffolder tests pass unchanged.

BoberConfigSchema parses a config WITH a fleet section {blackboardDbPath,blackboardNamespace,blackboardSubject,maxRounds} and WITHOUT one (absent); a config with no fleet section parses identically to today (the field is optional and absent from output).
FleetManifestSchema parses a manifest with blackboard {namespace,maxRounds} and without; maxRounds>3 is a ZodError; a no-blackboard manifest parses identically to today.

resolveBlackboardPath returns the absolute join(resolve(rootDir),'.bober','memory',namespace,'facts.db') when blackboard set, else undefined; and the scaffolder writes the fleet section (with blackboardSubject=child.folder + the absolute path) into each child bober.config.json when configured, and omits it (byte-identical child config) when not.

`agent-bober blackboard publish <value>` run in a cwd whose bober.config.json has a fleet section opens SharedBlackboard at config.fleet.blackboardDbPath and writes a finding with subject=blackboardSubject; with no fleet section it prints a clear message and exits 1 (no throw).

`agent-bober blackboard read [--all]` prints sibling findings (or all with --all) and exits 0 with an empty result when none; a two-cwd test (two configs pointing at ONE shared blackboardDbPath) confirms each cwd sees the other's published finding (path comes from config, not cwd).

lint passes; the change is additive (config schema, manifest schema, scaffolder, a resolve helper, the new CLI command + registration) and the no-blackboard fleet path is byte-identical (scaffolder writes no fleet section).

nonGoals: Do NOT implement the coordinator rounds loop (Sprint 3) — this sprint only injects config + provides the CLI seam.
Do NOT auto-wire the blackboard into `agent-bober run` — participation is via the explicit `agent-bober blackboard` CLI only.
Do NOT change the no-blackboard scaffolder output (omit the fleet section entirely).
Do NOT re-derive the db path from cwd in the CLI — read it from config.fleet only.
stopConditions: config.fleet + manifest.blackboard parse additively, resolveBlackboardPath + scaffolder inject the absolute path per child, the `agent-bober blackboard` publish/read CLI works across two cwds via one shared path, and the no-blackboard path is byte-identical
definitionOfDone: BoberConfigSchema has an optional fleet section; FleetManifestSchema has an optional blackboard block; resolveBlackboardPath returns the absolute shared path; the scaffolder writes the per-child fleet section when configured (omits it otherwise); `agent-bober blackboard publish|read` works against config.fleet.blackboardDbPath and fails clean with no fleet section. Collocated tests cover schema parse (with/without), resolveBlackboardPath, scaffolder injection + byte-identical-when-absent, the CLI publish/read, the no-config error path, and the two-cwd shared-visibility test. Build/typecheck/test/lint green.
assumptions: Sprint 1's SharedBlackboard (open/publish/readSiblings/readAll/close) is available and used by the CLI.

The scaffolder (src/fleet/scaffolder.ts:57-58) writes JSON.stringify(buildChildConfig(child)) to <absPath>/bober.config.json; the fleet section must be merged into that written config when a blackboard is configured (the run passes the resolved path + namespace + maxRounds + the child folder into the scaffold step).

CLI commands register via register*Command(program) (cli/index.ts:318-321); registerBlackboardCommand mirrors that. Loading the cwd config reuses the existing config loader; failure to find a fleet section is a clean exit-1 (printed), never a throw.
The package bin is `agent-bober` (COMMANDS.md uses it); the command is `agent-bober blackboard publish|read`.
generatorNotes:
Read FIRST: src/config/schema.ts (MedicalSectionSchema is a good template for an optional section; add a FleetSectionSchema sibling and `fleet: FleetSectionSchema.optional()` on BoberConfigSchema ~:405-421); src/fleet/manifest.ts (FleetManifestSchema — add optional blackboard); src/fleet/scaffolder.ts (:1-65, where buildChildConfig is serialized to bober.config.json at :57-58 — you must merge the fleet section into that object BEFORE writeFile when a blackboard is configured; the scaffold signature/caller may need the resolved path+namespace+maxRounds threaded in); src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet — where resolveBlackboardPath is computed and passed to the coordinator/scaffolder; Sprint 3 wires the loop, but resolveBlackboardPath + the scaffolder threading land here); src/cli/index.ts (:38-40 imports, :318-321 registerMedicalCommand/registerFleetCommand — add registerBlackboardCommand); src/fleet/shared-blackboard.ts (Sprint 1) for the CLI to use; the config loader (how to load a bober.config.json from cwd — see how `run`/`fleet` load config).

FleetSectionSchema = z.object({ blackboardDbPath: z.string(), blackboardNamespace: z.string(), blackboardSubject: z.string(), maxRounds: z.number().int().min(1).max(3) }). resolveBlackboardPath(manifest): manifest.blackboard ? join(resolve(manifest.rootDir), '.bober', 'memory', manifest.blackboard.namespace, 'facts.db') : undefined.

Scaffolder: thread an optional { fleet?: {dbPath, namespace, maxRounds} } into scaffold(); when present, after building the child config object, set config.fleet = { blackboardDbPath: dbPath, blackboardNamespace: namespace, blackboardSubject: child.folder, maxRounds } before JSON.stringify+writeFile. When absent, write exactly as today (no fleet key).

CLI src/cli/commands/blackboard.ts: registerBlackboardCommand(program) adds `blackboard` with subcommands publish <value> [--round N] and read [--all]. Both: load cwd bober.config.json; if !config.fleet → console.error a clear message + process.exitCode=1 (no throw); else open SharedBlackboard({dbPath: config.fleet.blackboardDbPath, namespace: config.fleet.blackboardNamespace, maxRounds: config.fleet.maxRounds}); publish → sb.publish({childFolder: config.fleet.blackboardSubject, round: opts.round ?? 1, payload: value}, nowIso); read → print sb.readSiblings(config.fleet.blackboardSubject) (or sb.readAll() with --all) as lines `[subject] value`; close in finally.

Tests: schema (with/without fleet + blackboard, maxRounds>3 ZodError); resolveBlackboardPath; scaffolder (injects fleet section with correct subject+path when configured; byte-identical no-fleet output otherwise); CLI publish/read via the core function (export a testable runBlackboard core like runFleet does, DI the cwd/config); two-cwd shared-visibility (two temp dirs, two configs with the SAME blackboardDbPath, publish from one, read from the other). Follow ESM .js imports, import type, unicode section headers.
evaluatorNotes: sc-2-3/sc-2-4: parse configs/manifests with and without the new optional blocks; assert a no-fleet config and no-blackboard manifest are byte-identical to prior parse; maxRounds=4 → ZodError. sc-2-5: resolveBlackboardPath returns an ABSOLUTE path containing '.bober/memory/<ns>/facts.db'; scaffold a child with a blackboard configured → read the written bober.config.json and assert config.fleet.blackboardSubject===child.folder and blackboardDbPath===the absolute shared path; scaffold without → assert no 'fleet' key. sc-2-6: invoke the blackboard publish core in a cwd with a fleet config → a finding is written (verify via SharedBlackboard.readAll at that path); in a cwd with no fleet section → exit code 1 + a printed message, no throw. sc-2-7: two temp cwds sharing one blackboardDbPath: publish 'hello' from cwd A (subject A), read --all from cwd B → sees A's 'hello'; read (siblings) from cwd B (subject B) → sees A's. sc-2-2: FULL suite, only 6 known cockpit failures; existing config/manifest/scaffolder tests unchanged. Build/typecheck/lint clean.
